subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto him who hath rent asunder the veils of idle fancies on a Day when such servants as violated the Covenant of God did cling fast unto them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن خرق حجبات الاوهام فی یوم تمسک بها عباد نقضوا عهد الله و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
